title: Career Opportunity Medical Officer at Apollo Hospitals

jsonLd.title: Career Opportunity Medical Officer at Apollo Hospitals
jsonLd.description:
We at Apollo Hospitals are looking for an experienced Medical Officer based out of Raipur. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Apollo Hospitals:
Apollo Hospitals is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Educate patients and families on health management and disease prevention
• Provide high-quality patient care and maintain patient records
• Diagnose and treat medical conditions following established protocols
• Collaborate with pharmaceutical representatives and medical suppliers
• Participate in quality improvement initiatives and clinical audits
• Monitor patient progress and adjust treatment plans accordingly
• Maintain accurate clinical documentation in electronic health records

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in EMR/EHR
• Proficiency in Wound Care
• Proficiency in HIPAA Compliance
• Proficiency in Infection Control
• Proficiency in Clinical Documentation
• Proficiency in ICD-10
• Proficiency in Medical Ethics
• Proficiency in Diagnostic Skills

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Flexible working hours
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Raipur, Chhattisgarh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Apollo Hospitals!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
